notes: Each entry is one real question raised by a potential customer on Reddit. Generated blog posts MUST answer exactly one unused question per run, framed as either a Q&A or a clearly-labelled realistic example scenario. Used questions are tracked in data/used-blog-questions.json so we never repeat one.
